top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump keeps the world guessing with mixed messaging on Iran deal
top_signals.summary: While he says that Washington will not rush into a deal, energy stockpiles risk hitting the red zone this summer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese Firms Speed Up Plans to Build New Coal Power Plants: GEM
top_signals.summary: Chinese firms are accelerating the pace at which they propose new coal-fired power plants, even as the government moves to rein in growth after the rapid expansion in recent years.
